items.title: Woman and child found dead in Queensland home
items.standfirst: T he bodies were found inside a home this morning.
items.content: A woman and a child have been found dead in a home south of Brisbane this morning.Police were called to a supermarket on Beaudesert Beenleigh Road at Bannockburn, a suburb of Logan, at around 7.30am, where they found a man with injuries.Officers discovered the man had run to the supermarket from a property at nearby Belivah.LIVE UPDATES: Huge explosion from attack on oil plantWhen investigators went to the house at Belivah, they found the bodies of a woman and a child.The man is receiving medical treatment and will be assisting police with their investigations. Police do not believe there is any ongoing threat to the community.More to come.Support is available from the National Sexual Assault, Domestic and Family Violence Counselling Service at 1800RESPECT (1800 737 732)

items.title: Man found wounded at supermarket assisting police as woman and child found dead
